en: In the year that King Uzziah died I saw the Lord sitting upon a throne, high and lifted up; and the train of his robe filled the temple.
zh: 烏西雅王去世那年，我看見主坐在高高的寶座上，他的衣裳垂下，充滿聖殿。

en: Above him stood the seraphim. Each had six wings: with two he covered his face, and with two he covered his feet, and with two he flew.
zh: 在他上面有撒拉弗侍立，各有六個翅膀；用兩個翅膀遮臉，兩個翅膀遮腳，兩個翅膀飛翔。

en: And one called to another and said: "Holy, holy, holy is the LORD of hosts; the whole earth is full of his glory!"
zh: 他們彼此高呼著說： “聖哉！聖哉！聖哉！萬軍之耶和華！ 他的榮光充滿全地。”

en: And the foundations of the thresholds shook at the voice of him who called, and the house was filled with smoke.
zh: 因呼叫者的聲音，門檻的根基震撼，殿也充滿了煙雲。

en: And I said: "Woe is me! For I am lost; for I am a man of unclean lips, and I dwell in the midst of a people of unclean lips; for my eyes have seen the King, the LORD of hosts!"
zh: 那時我說： “我有禍了，我滅亡了！ 因為我是個嘴唇不潔的人， 又住在嘴唇不潔的人民中間， 又因為我親眼看見了大君王萬軍之耶和華。”

en: Then one of the seraphim flew to me, having in his hand a burning coal that he had taken with tongs from the altar.
zh: 有一個撒拉弗飛到我面前，手裡拿著燒紅的炭，是用火鉗從祭壇上取來的。

en: And he touched my mouth and said: "Behold, this has touched your lips; your guilt is taken away, and your sin atoned for.
zh: 他用炭沾我的口，說：“看哪！這炭沾了你的嘴唇，你的罪孽就除掉，你的罪惡就赦免了。”

en: And I heard the voice of the Lord saying, "Whom shall I send, and who will go for us?" Then I said, "Here am I! Send me."
zh: 我又聽見主的聲音說：“我可以差遣誰呢？誰肯為我們去呢？”我說：“我在這裡，請差遣我。”

en: And he said, "Go, and say to this people: "' Keep on hearing, but do not understand; keep on seeing, but do not perceive.'
zh: 他說：“你去告訴這子民，說： ‘你們聽了又聽，卻不明白； 看了又看，卻不曉得。’

en: Make the heart of this people dull, and their ears heavy, and blind their eyes; lest they see with their eyes, and hear with their ears, and understand with their hearts, and turn and be healed."
zh: 你要使這子民的心思遲鈍 ， 耳朵不靈， 眼睛昏暗， 免得他們眼睛看見， 耳朵聽見， 心裡明白， 回轉過來，得到醫治。”

en: Then I said, "How long, O Lord?" And he said: "Until cities lie waste without inhabitant, and houses without people, and the land is a desolate waste,
zh: 於是我說：“主啊，這要到幾時為止呢？”他回答說： “直到城鎮荒涼，無人居住； 房屋空置無人， 地土廢棄荒涼。

en: and the LORD removes people far away, and the forsaken places are many in the midst of the land.
zh: 耶和華要把人遷到遠方， 在這境內必有很多被撇下的地土。

en: And though a tenth remain in it, it will be burned again, like a terebinth or an oak, whose stump remains when it is felled." The holy seed is its stump.
zh: 境內剩下的人，雖然只有十分之一， 也必被消滅。 但正如栗樹和橡樹， 雖然被砍下，樹的餘幹還存留在那裡。 這聖潔的苗裔，就是這國的餘幹。”
